instruction: Find a large car from next Monday to Friday in Zurich, sorted by price.

evaluator.eval: check_direct_json_object(get_active_tab_url_parse(env, config={'goto_prefix': 'https://www.', 'parse_keys': ['locationName', 'dropLocationName', 'filterCriteria_carCategory', 'filterCriteria_sortBy']}), rules={'expected': {'locationName': 'Zürich', 'dropLocationName': 'Zürich', 'filterCriteria_carCategory': 'large', 'filterCriteria_sortBy': 'PRICE'}}) and check_direct_json_object(get_active_tab_url_parse(env, config={'goto_prefix': 'https://www.', 'parse_keys': ['puDay', 'puMonth', 'puYear', 'doDay', 'doMonth', 'doYear']}), rules=get_rule_relativeTime(env, config={'rules': {'relativeTime': {'from': 'next Monday split', 'to': 'next Friday split'}, 'timezone': 'Europe/Zurich', 'expected': {'puDay': '{DayD}', 'puMonth': '{MonthD}', 'puYear': '{Year}', 'doDay': '{DayD}', 'doMonth': '{MonthD}', 'doYear': '{Year}'}}}))
